subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Lord! With utmost humility I stretch forth my suppliant hands toward the Kingdom of pardon and forgiveness, and commune with Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب رب اننی بکل ضراعه ابسط اکف الابتهال الی ملکوت العفو و الغفران و اناجیک
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
